# Meraki Roofing

> Meraki Roofing (Meraki Restoration, LLC) is a GAF Certified Plus roofing
> contractor in El Paso, TX. Locally owned, 4.8-star rated with 50+ verified
> reviews. Specializes in residential and commercial roofing with free
> drone-assisted roof inspections using DJI M30T thermal imaging. Serves
> El Paso, Las Cruces, Chaparral, Anthony, Canutillo, Santa Teresa, Fabens,
> Clint, Horizon City, and Socorro.

## Services

- [Residential Roofing](https://merakirestoration.com/residential.html): Shingle, tile, metal, and slate roof installation, repair, and replacement with 10-year workmanship warranty
- [Commercial Roofing](https://merakirestoration.com/commercial.html): Flat, TPO, metal, and coated roofing systems for retail, warehouses, and businesses
- [Storm Damage Repair](https://merakirestoration.com/storm-damage.html): 24/7 emergency hail, wind, and water damage roof repair with under 2-hour response time
- [Insurance Claims](https://merakirestoration.com/insurance-claims.html): Full insurance claims management from documentation to settlement, $0 out-of-pocket for most homeowners, 500+ claims filed
- [Drone Roof Inspections](https://merakirestoration.com/drone-inspections.html): Advanced DJI M30T thermal and visual drone inspections to detect hidden moisture, insulation gaps, and damage without climbing a ladder
- [Roof Maintenance](https://merakirestoration.com/maintenance.html): Annual maintenance plans starting at $449/year — Essential, Premium, and Elite tiers
- [Financing](https://merakirestoration.com/financing.html): $0 down, low monthly payments, quick approval for roofing projects
- [Free Estimate](https://merakirestoration.com/estimate.html): Book a free professional roof inspection with detailed report and quote within 24 hours

## Certifications & Products

- [GAF Certified Plus](https://merakirestoration.com/gaf.html): Only 7% of roofers earn GAF certification. Offers GAF Timberline HDZ shingles with enhanced warranties.

## Guides & Resources

- [Roofing Materials Guide](https://merakirestoration.com/blog-roofing-materials-guide.html): Asphalt vs. metal vs. tile vs. slate comparison with costs, lifespan, and climate performance for El Paso
- [Complete El Paso Roofing Guide](https://merakirestoration.com/blog-el-paso-roofing-guide.html): Everything homeowners need to know about roofing in El Paso's extreme desert climate
- [Hail Damage Guide](https://merakirestoration.com/blog-hail-damage-guide.html): Detection, repair vs. replacement, insurance claims, and prevention strategies
- [Insurance Claims Guide](https://merakirestoration.com/blog-insurance-claims-guide.html): How to maximize your roof insurance claim payout in El Paso
- [Repair vs. Replacement](https://merakirestoration.com/blog-repair-vs-replacement.html): Decision framework for El Paso homeowners
